commands: vite migrate --no-interactive # migration should merge vite.config.ts and remove oxlintrc and oxfmtrc
cat .oxlintrc.json && exit 1 || true # check .oxlintrc.json is removed
cat .oxfmtrc.json && exit 1 || true # check .oxfmtrc.json is removed
cat packages/only-oxlint/.oxlintrc.json && exit 1 || true # check only-oxlint .oxlintrc.json is removed
